title: Heal and Feed plugin
description: HealXFeeder is a Minecraft plugin that adds valuable healing and feeding functionalities to your server. Featuring a 5-minute cooldown and permission-based access, it allows server owners to control which players can use these commands.
body:
# HealXFeeder


HealXFeeder is a versatile Minecraft plugin designed to elevate player experiences by providing convenient healing and feeding commands. With a 5-minute cooldown, this plugin ensures balanced gameplay while allowing server owners to manage permissions seamlessly. Players with the appropriate permissions can utilize the healing and feeding commands to restore health and hunger levels, making it ideal for both casual and competitive play. Customize access through the permission node `healxfeed:use` and enjoy enhanced server management with HealXFeeder.


Use this permission for Normal: healxfeed:use
